diagrams.title: KMP Algorithm Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the two-phase structure of KMP: preprocessing (building LPS) and searching
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete KMP workflow and its efficiency

diagrams.title: LPS Array Construction
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how LPS values are computed for pattern 'ABABC'
elements: Pattern: A B A B C
diagrams.purpose: Learning how to compute LPS array step by step

diagrams.title: KMP vs Naive Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparing character comparisons made by KMP and Naive for finding 'AA' in 'AAAA'
elements: Shows how KMP skips redundant comparisons
Visual of how LPS helps skip positions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why KMP is more efficient than naive approach
